blocks.text: Match preview: England A Women face India A Women in Unofficial 3rd ODI (ODI) on Sat, 4 Jul, 2026, 3:30 pm at The Cooper Associates County Ground Taunton. Full pitch report, weather forecast, and squad details below.

rows: England A Women vs India A Women
India A Women tour of England 2026
The Cooper Associates County Ground Taunton

blocks.text: Standard ODI surface expected. Conditions will be clearer at the toss — monitor team selection and dew factor for night games.
Expected par score: 250–290 runs par score.
Overcast · High 26°C / Low 13°C · Rain: 0 mm · Wind: up to 18 km/h. Cloud cover expected — seamers may get movement with the new ball.
International playing XI is announced at the toss. Check back on match day for confirmed line-ups.
